raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Asynchronous telehealth allows for remote communication between providers and patients, which can reduce waiting times and facilitate faster access to patient-centered care.",
    "Studies have shown high rates of safety, effectiveness, and patient acceptability for asynchronous care, comparable to approval rates for in-person care.",
    "Asynchronous care can alleviate technological barriers, scheduling constraints, and privacy concerns.",
    "Californians with private insurance benefit from using convenient apps because asynchronous telehealth options are covered under private health plans.",
    "Medi-Cal patients are currently barred from accessing the same telehealth options available to those with private insurance.",
    "AB 2339 would expand access to sensitive health services provided using asynchronous modalities, like apps, for Medi-Cal beneficiaries.",
    "The bill would authorize a health care provider to establish a new patient relationship using asynchronous telehealth when requested by the patient for sensitive services.",
    "Allowing Medi-Cal beneficiaries to access asynchronous telehealth will provide equal access to services and convenient care compared to their peers with private insurance."
  ]
}
```
